query:
SELECT 
  '订单明细数据' as source,
  oi.grossWeight as grossWeight,
  oi.netWeight as netWeight,
  oi.cbm as cbm,
  oi.quantity as quantity
FROM order_items oi
WHERE oi.orderId = 330003

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  '批次V034外箱数据' as source,
  pb.grossWeight as grossWeight,
  pb.netWeight as netWeight,
  pb.cbm as cbm,
  NULL as quantity
FROM package_boxes pb
JOIN product_variants pv ON pb.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V034'
LIMIT 1;
